title: ADR-0004 — Deploy on AWS via CDK + Batch/Fargate
summary: Decision to describe AWS infrastructure as code via CDK split into data lake, compute (Batch/Fargate), IAM, and observability stacks.
notes: Status is Superseded by ADR-0011 (compute portion only; CDK/IaC and S3 data-lake decisions still stand), so not currently locked.
